title: Training Composer 2
summary: Cursor's Composer 2 is built from Kimi K2.5 base model with 1T parameters and 32B active parameters. The model employs continued coding-focused pre-training, long-horizon reinforcement learning with auto-install capabilities, reward shaping with nonlinear length penalties, and self-summarization to handle context limits.
